versions.description:
# Zombie Racing

Zombie Racing is a Takaro community module that adds a configurable race betting mini-game to game servers with Takaro economy enabled. Players bet currency on a racer before the race starts, Takaro runs the race on a schedule or by admin command, then pays winning bets and posts the result in chat.

The default setup uses a zombie race theme, but server owners can rename the race, change racer labels, set payout odds, adjust commentary, and turn the same module into horse racing, robot racing, turtle racing, or another server event.

![Zombie Racing chat result in Takaro](/images/zombie-racing/zombieracing_chat.png)

## What it adds

- Configurable racers with custom names, labels, odds, and weighted winner chances.
- Currency betting through Takaro economy, including minimum and maximum bet limits.
- Scheduled races through cron jobs, plus an admin command for manual starts.
- Live race commentary messages for early, middle, and late race moments.
- Player race stats, current bets, last race results, and a leaderboard.
- Recovery logic for interrupted running races so race state, payouts, and stats stay consistent.

## Configuration

Use the module configuration to set the race name, racer type labels, entrants, betting limits, payout odds, commentary lines, and race timing. Entrants use `Name; Odds` lines, for example `Biker; 2`, where the number controls the payout multiplier.

![Zombie Racing user configuration in Takaro](/images/zombie-racing/zombieracing_config.png)

System configuration controls the cron jobs, delayed finish hooks, commentary hooks, commands, and permissions used by the module.

![Zombie Racing system configuration in Takaro](/images/zombie-racing/zombieracing_system_config.png)

## Commands

| Command | Permission | Purpose |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `/racebet <racer> <amount>` | `RACING_BET` | Place or replace a bet for the next race. |
| `/racers` | `RACING_BET` | Show available racers, odds, next race timing, and bet limits. |
| `/myracebets` | `RACING_BET` | Show your current or locked race bets. |
| `/nextrace` | `RACING_BET` | Show upcoming race status and your active bets. |
| `/lastrace` | `RACING_BET` | Show the latest race winner, standings, and your result. |
| `/racestats` | `RACING_BET` | Show your personal betting statistics. |
| `/raceleaderboard` | `RACING_BET` | Show the top racing bettors by net winnings. |
| `/startrace` | `RACING_ADMIN` | Start a race manually. |

## Hooks and cron jobs

`announceRace` and `startRace` handle scheduled announcements and race starts. The finish hooks complete scheduled or manually started races after the configured delay, and commentary hooks send live race updates. `recoverRunningRace` can finish or clean up a race that was interrupted while running.

![Zombie Racing events in Takaro](/images/zombie-racing/zombieracing_events.png)

## Requirements

Enable Takaro economy before installing Zombie Racing. Grant `RACING_BET` to players who can place race bets and `RACING_ADMIN` to staff who can start races manually.

Format: Name; Odds (whole number) - one racer per line.","default":["Biker; 2","Arlene; 3","Darlene; 3","Chuck; 4","Moe; 5","Nurse; 6"],"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},"commentaryEarlyTemplates":{"title":"Early race commentary templates","description":"Messages used for the first live race update. Supports {winner}, {leader}, {rival}, {raceName}, {racer}, and {racers}.","default":["{leader} jumps out first, but {winner} is staying close.","{leader} takes the early lead while {winner} waits for an opening.","{leader} is setting the pace. {winner} is right behind."],"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},"commentaryMiddleTemplates":{"title":"Middle race commentary templates","description":"Messages used for the second live race update. Supports {winner}, {leader}, {rival}, {raceName}, {racer}, and {racers}.","default":["{winner} is catching {leader} fast. {rival} is trying to keep pace.","{winner} closes the gap on {leader}; {rival} is still in the mix.","{leader} is under pressure now. {winner} is gaining ground."],"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},"commentaryLateTemplates":{"title":"Late race commentary templates","description":"Messages used for the final live race update before results. Supports {winner}, {leader}, {rival}, {raceName}, {racer}, and {racers}.","default":["{winner} overtakes {leader} in the final stretch.","{winner} surges past {leader}; the finish line is close.","{winner} finds another gear and takes the lead from {leader}."],"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}}}}

hooks.name: raceCommentaryEarlyAfterScheduledStart
hooks.description: Broadcast the first scheduled race commentary update

hooks.name: raceCommentaryMiddleAfterScheduledStart
hooks.description: Broadcast the second scheduled race commentary update

hooks.name: raceCommentaryLateAfterScheduledStart
hooks.description: Broadcast the final scheduled race commentary update before results

hooks.name: raceCommentaryEarlyAfterManualStart
hooks.description: Broadcast the first manual race commentary update

hooks.name: raceCommentaryMiddleAfterManualStart
hooks.description: Broadcast the second manual race commentary update

hooks.name: raceCommentaryLateAfterManualStart
hooks.description: Broadcast the final manual race commentary update before results

hooks.name: finishRaceAfterScheduledStart
hooks.description: Finish a scheduled race after the configured delay

hooks.name: finishRaceAfterManualStart
hooks.description: Finish a manually started race after the configured delay

cronJobs.name: announceRace
cronJobs.description: Announce each upcoming two-hour race 15 minutes before it starts

cronJobs.name: startRace
cronJobs.description: Start the scheduled race every two hours

cronJobs.name: recoverRunningRace
cronJobs.description: Recover races that remain running after their expected finish time
